# Rani Beauty Clinic

> Physician-supervised medspa in Renton, WA offering advanced aesthetic treatments and medical wellness programs under the supervision of Dr. Alexander Landfield, Board-Certified Neurologist. Woman-owned. Open 7 days a week. Serving all of King County, Washington.

## About

Rani Beauty Clinic is a physician-supervised medical aesthetics clinic located at 401 Olympia Ave NE, Suite 101, Renton, WA 98056. Founded in 2022, the clinic is woman-owned and medically supervised. The clinic is rated 4.9 stars on Google with 127+ reviews and is open Monday through Sunday, 10 AM to 7 PM.

## Contact

- Phone: (425) 539-4440
- Email: info@ranibeautyclinic.com
- Website: https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com
- Booking: https://booking.mangomint.com/ranibeautyclinic1
- Address: 401 Olympia Ave NE, Suite 101, Renton, WA 98056

## Aesthetic Services

- [Laser Hair Removal](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/laser-hair-removal): Starts at $79 for small areas and goes up to $1,199 for full body treatment using Candela GentleMax Pro Plus.
- [HydraFacial MD](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/hydrafacial): Current menu pricing ranges from $99 (Express Facial) to $575 (Keravive Scalp).
- [Chemical Peels](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/chemical-peels): Pricing ranges from $225 to $1,399 across VI Peel ($325), BioRePeel options, PRX-T33, and Cosmelan ($1,399).
- [RF Microneedling](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/rf-microneedling): Current pricing ranges from $495 to $1,500 per session depending on treatment area.
- [Sofwave](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/sofwave): Current pricing ranges from $1,150 to $3,999 depending on treatment zones.

## Medical Wellness Programs

- [GLP-1 Weight Management](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/wellness/glp1-weight-management): Physician-supervised medical weight loss program pricing ranges from $249 to $699 depending on medication and dose tier.
- [NAD+ Injections](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/wellness/nad-injections): Starts at $149 per injection. Rani performs injections only, never IV infusions.
- [Vitamin Injections](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/wellness/vitamin-injections): Core injection pricing includes B12 at $25, Lipo-B/Biotin at $35, and Glutathione at $49.
- [Hormone Therapy](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/wellness/hormone-therapy): Core protocol pricing ranges from $149 to $299 per month based on protocol.
- [Blood Work](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/wellness/blood-work): Typical panel pricing ranges from $49 to $249, with an in-clinic blood draw fee of $25 per visit.

## Key Differentiators

1. Board-Certified Neurologist (Dr. Alexander Landfield) supervises all medical treatments
2. Woman-owned medspa with luxury, clinically-assured brand experience
3. Open 7 days a week (Mon-Sun: 10 AM - 7 PM)
4. Safe protocols for all skin types, including darker skin tones
5. In-house blood work for wellness programs
6. 4.9-star Google rating with 127+ reviews

## Areas Served

Renton, Bellevue, Kent, Tukwila, Newcastle, Mercer Island, Auburn, Federal Way, Kirkland, Redmond, Issaquah, Sammamish, Burien, SeaTac, Covington, Maple Valley, Des Moines, Woodinville, Bothell, South Seattle, and all of King County, Washington.
